summary.title: Shopify Checkout Pipeline Threat Model
summary.description: This threat model covers a checkout pipeline for Shopify that includes the following components: Customer browser, front - end web application, authentication services, shopping cart services, payment processing integration, order database, and external payment processor

diagrams.title: Shopify STRIDE Diagram

threats.title: User Impersonation
threats.description: Threat actor impersonates current legitimate user to gain unauthorized access

threats.title: Data exposed
threats.description: Sensitive data is intercepted or leaked during transmission
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: User Impersonation
threats.description: Threat actor impersonates current legitimate user to gain unauthorized access

threats.title: DDoS Attack
threats.description: Attackers send multiple payloads to front end page to slow operations
threats.mitigation:
- Configure WAF Firewalls 
- Implement rate limiting and throttling
- Configure error handling

threats.title: Information Disclosure
threats.description: Attacker uses SQL injection via sign in page
threats.mitigation: Enforce strict input validation across all platforms and use strong authorization

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description: Provide a description for this threat
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Privilege Escalation
threats.description: Attacker gains unauthorized access to admin page
threats.mitigation: Use strong passwords with no less than 15 characters, make code changes to limit the number of login attempts, Enforce MFA

threats.title: Data Manipulation
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Obfuscation of payment
threats.description: Attackers add entries to obfuscate illegal transactions
threats.mitigation: Implement input validation on all log entries, validate log data integrity, and deploy tamper proof web server logs

threats.title: Data Manipulation
threats.mitigation: Ensure SSL/TLS is utilized across all data flows to protect and authenticate cookies and prevent in-transit manipulation

diagrams.description: This stride diagram covers spoofing, tampering, repudiation, information disclosure, denial of service, and elevation privelege
